title: Everlasting Blooms — Northwind Botanicals
preheaderText: Dried & preserved arrangements, made to last. New season, now shipping.
heroImageAlt: A hand-tied arrangement of dried botanicals in a terracotta vase
heroParagraph: Our dried and preserved arrangements bring the quiet of a northern meadow indoors — no water, no wilting, just months of understated colour.
heroBgSubtext: Dried & preserved, made to last a season and more.
col1Text: Cedar, wheat and eucalyptus in a matte stoneware vase.
col2Text: Ferns, ivy and cream roses for a woodland table.
